The Olympic flame arrived in Paris on Sunday as the torch relay enters the final stage of a journey that will end on July 26 at the opening ceremony of the 2024 edition of the Games in the French capital.

description: The Olympic flame arrived in Paris on Sunday as the torch relay enters the final stage of a journey that will end on July 26 at the opening ceremony of the 2024 edition of the Games in the French capital.
